title: FreshCart - Grocery Delivery
description: Order fresh fruits, vegetables, and daily essentials delivered to your doorstep within 30 minutes. FreshCart connects you to local farms and trusted suppliers for the best quality produce.

title: BugScan - Nature Identifier
description: Point your camera at any insect or plant and instantly get detailed information. BugScan uses AI-powered recognition to help nature lovers, students, and researchers identify over 50,000 species.

title: PixelForge - Photo Editor
description: A professional-grade photo editor packed with filters, layers, retouching tools, and AI enhancements. PixelForge makes stunning edits easy for beginners and powerful enough for pros.

title: PawPal - Pet Care Companion
description: Track your pet's health, schedule vet appointments, log meals, and connect with a community of pet lovers. PawPal is the all-in-one app for dogs, cats, and more.

title: ArtLens - Museum Explorer
description: Explore thousands of masterpieces from world-renowned museums. ArtLens lets you zoom into brushstrokes, listen to audio guides, and bookmark your favourite works for offline viewing.

title: RouteWise - Travel Planner
description: Plan road trips, city tours, and international travel with smart itinerary building, real-time traffic alerts, and curated local tips. RouteWise is your intelligent travel companion.

title: SpinTrack - Cycling Tracker
description: Log every ride, measure performance metrics, and challenge friends on leaderboards. SpinTrack syncs with your smartwatch and heart-rate monitor to give you a complete cycling experience.

title: MindMesh - Focus & Productivity
description: Boost your focus with Pomodoro timers, distraction blockers, daily goal tracking, and ambient soundscapes. MindMesh adapts to your work style and helps you get more done every day.
